claim: .github/workflows/ci.yml pins actions/checkout@v7, a nonexistent major, so the CI job cannot resolve the action and will fail.
rationale: False positive from a sweep sub-agent with stale version knowledge. actions/checkout v7.0.0 IS the current release (v4/v5/v6/v7 all exist) — verified 2026-07-17 via `gh api repos/actions/checkout/releases/latest` (=v7.0.0) and `gh api repos/actions/checkout/tags`. Rolodex CI has run on @v7 successfully on every recent push (`gh run list --workflow=ci.yml` — all 'success'). Acting on the finding would have DOWNGRADED working CI. The real, verified finding was the inverse: build.yml pinned checkout@v4 (3 majors behind) — bumped to @v7 for currency + consistency with ci.yml.
